subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the lights of Truth in the Orient of the world! The Sun of the luminous heaven hath risen and [illumined] the horizon of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب مشاهده انوار حق در مشرق عالم آفتاب سپهر انور طالع گشت و افق توحید را
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @light and darkness, @Manifestation of God as sun
